'''ngonadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:obcordate|obcordate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obcordate|obcordate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngonadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonadithi|ngonadithi]] || [[word:ngonadiji|ngonadiji]] || [[word:ngonadishi|ngonadishi]] || [[word:ngonadiki|ngonadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonaduthuthu|ngonaduthuthu]] || [[word:ngonadujuju|ngonadujuju]] || [[word:ngonadushushu|ngonadushushu]] || [[word:ngonadukuku|ngonadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonaduthu|ngonaduthu]] || [[word:ngonaduju|ngonaduju]] || [[word:ngonadushu|ngonadushu]] || [[word:ngonaduku|ngonaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonadufthuf|ngonadufthuf]] || [[word:ngonadufjuf|ngonadufjuf]] || [[word:ngonadufshuf|ngonadufshuf]] || [[word:ngonadufkuf|ngonadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonadethe|ngonadethe]] || [[word:ngonadeje|ngonadeje]] || [[word:ngonadeshe|ngonadeshe]] || [[word:ngonadeke|ngonadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonadothotho|ngonadothotho]] || [[word:ngonadojojo|ngonadojojo]] || [[word:ngonadoshosho|ngonadoshosho]] || [[word:ngonadokoko|ngonadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonadotho|ngonadotho]] || [[word:ngonadojo|ngonadojo]] || [[word:ngonadosho|ngonadosho]] || [[word:ngonadoko|ngonadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonadofthof|ngonadofthof]] || [[word:ngonadofjof|ngonadofjof]] || [[word:ngonadofshof|ngonadofshof]] || [[word:ngonadofkof|ngonadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonadĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonadĂŠthĂŠ|ngonadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngonadĂŠjĂŠ|ngonadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngonadĂŠshĂŠ|ngonadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngonadĂŠkĂŠ|ngonadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonadathatha|ngonadathatha]] || [[word:ngonadajaja|ngonadajaja]] || [[word:ngonadashasha|ngonadashasha]] || [[word:ngonadakaka|ngonadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonadatha|ngonadatha]] || [[word:ngonadaja|ngonadaja]] || [[word:ngonadasha|ngonadasha]] || [[word:ngonadaka|ngonadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonadafthaf|ngonadafthaf]] || [[word:ngonadafjaf|ngonadafjaf]] || [[word:ngonadafshaf|ngonadafshaf]] || [[word:ngonadafkaf|ngonadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngonadasha|ngonadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngonadshĂ«sha|ngonadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngonadrosha|ngonadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngonadmusha|ngonadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngonadyasha|ngonadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongonadnkshĂ«sha|gongonadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongonadnkrosha|gongonadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongonadnkmusha|gongonadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongonadnkyasha|gongonadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngonanadasha|ngonanadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngonanadshĂ«sha|ngonanadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngonanadrosha|ngonanadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngonanadmusha|ngonanadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngonanadyasha|ngonanadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongonanadnkshĂ«sha|gongonanadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongonanadnkrosha|gongonanadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongonanadnkmusha|gongonanadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongonanadnkyasha|gongonanadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngenĂŠdasha|ngenĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngenĂŠdshĂ«sha|ngenĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngenĂŠdrosha|ngenĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngenĂŠdmusha|ngenĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngenĂŠdyasha|ngenĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongenĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gongenĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongenĂŠdnkrosha|gongenĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongenĂŠdnkmusha|gongenĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongenĂŠdnkyasha|gongenĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngonfadasha|ngonfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngonfadshĂ«sha|ngonfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngonfadrosha|ngonfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngonfadmusha|ngonfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngonfadyasha|ngonfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongonfadnkshĂ«sha|gongonfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongonfadnkrosha|gongonfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongonfadnkmusha|gongonfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongonfadnkyasha|gongonfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
